pr.title: Record: 11L Int6+Zstd MLP3x SmearGate BigramHash OrthoInit MuonWD EMA (mean val_bpb=1.1497)

output.summary: 11-layer MLP3x transformer uses int6+zstd compression, SmearGate, BigramHash, OrthoInit, Muon WD, EMA, and sliding-window eval.
techniques: Int6+zstd compression with SmearGate and BigramHash-enhanced embeddings
OrthoInit plus Muon weight decay and EMA for stable compressed training
Sliding-window eval at stride 256 with FP16 tied embeddings
